## Summary

Describe the user-visible behavior and motivation.

## Compatibility evidence

- [ ] Added or updated baseline/candidate fixtures
- [ ] Added compatible counterexamples where applicable
- [ ] Rule ID, severity, location, and message are stable and documented

## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm pack --dry-run`
- [ ] README and CHANGELOG updated for user-visible changes
- [ ] No proprietary API documents, credentials, or sensitive reports included
